title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese outlines 3 rules and 6 leadership moves for successfully building projects with Claude Code, drawing on his experience scaling a 25M+ startup. The content emphasizes what not to build versus what should be prioritized before starting any project.
